notes: The FlagPole prop's animation state-machine (R-SYS-008): idle (03c9697e6cca30f9, clip flag_idle) <-> wave (258b1d19abc686ae, clip flag_wave), gated on a control parameter the gameplay couples to the ball's accumulated impact count -- after 3 bounces the flag starts waving. State ids are L-33 stable intra-file ids (16..32 lowercase hex; human labels live here in notes -- inside a project dir the id form is enforced by validate, unlike the standalone samples/anim-graphs/ few-shot). The wave clip carries a non-zero root yaw rate, so the animation package's deterministic root-motion accumulation is sim-visible (the smoke gate asserts it). The runtime mirror in src/tests/integration/games/ compiles this same graph shape into the animation package's Rig.
